黎渊来到凶兽肆虐，万族入侵的高武世界。
并被告知距离人族文明灭亡仅剩三十年。
好在入伍第一天，觉醒军神杀戮系统。
开局获得S级武道天赋不朽金身！
每次达到成就，都能获得奖励。”
“宿主首次获得功勋点，奖励：恒星呼吸法！“
“宿主在新兵比武获得冠军，奖励：掌控境拳法！”
“宿主首次获得将星，奖励：本源神胎！”
不仅如此，每当他击杀凶兽、万族，都能获得升级点。
消耗升级点，可提升武道境界与武道技艺。
“升级点-1000，境界提升！二阶武者！”
“技能点-1000000，不朽金身进化！SSS级万古不朽身！”
人族文明仅剩三十年？
黎渊肩扛五星金徽，站在万万人前方，一刀斩开星界大门。
此刻！人族正式反攻异族！
犯我华夏，虽远必诛！刀锋所过，皆为吾土！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5daca432cd14b22e08491f2781b7c805","author":"蓝瞳星眸","author_id":"","book_id":"7381870987354065944","book_name":"买不起资源，只好参军杀成军神","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#583830","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7381871017532064280","read_count":"18023","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1529478"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"624","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/067709323f6b38dfa07a2b45b75c727c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779507436&x-signature=lCRt53XYyVqqDI7zJK6vIPehdE8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"52936355193","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"191"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032411371685F53EAE933598D5DDB8"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":11268,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":16923},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":fals
